item1_sensitivity_sigma_range.framing: sigma varies only 1.34-1.41x across the grid (referee's predicted compression); report as CONJUNCTION - flat acc AND tail<=budget across grid, while 3.6-6x larger fails catastrophically

item2_certified_delta.framing: delta strictly positive (non-vacuous) but ~1.6-2.2% of median inter-query distance; HONEST: uniform-over-region ball is small; pointwise certificate carries the paper

item3_purity_wording: Theorem 1 certifies WHICH sources decide (equality with near-field vote), NOT that near-field vote is correct; near purity 0.25-0.47 = plurality not majority; 'intended sources'='near sources'

item4_modality_baselines.framing: budget failure travels universally (100-10^5x overshoot everywhere); accuracy failure regime-dependent (text 1-3pt, tabular up to 11pt) - report the nuance honestly
